title: tephroseris salisburgensis
intro: Tephroseris salisburgensis, also known as the Austrian mountain everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Tephroseris salisburgensis has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
